title: Jet Ski Boats
description: Turns the boring boats into jet skis!
body:
![Jet Ski Boats Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75e7cf7040d49011b9b6878d303c5ab9eb9abfa_0.webp)

# Turn Those Boats Into Jet Skis!!

This texturepack turns boats into jet skis to make boating a more fun experience!! It includes all boat variants but not the chest boat variants (yet).

**This texturepack does require Entity Model Features**

To make riding the jet ski even more fun I would recomend usinng the Physics Mod Pro!
